hotkey.deadFallback: The key combination could not be registered.

works.pushToTalk: Push-to-talk with a focus-neutral recording overlay
works.injection: Text inserted straight into the application you were working in
works.typedIpc: Typed IPC surface (ts-rs bindings as the single source of truth)
works.logging: Structured logging: console, rotating JSON file, live log view

home.notYetBody: There is no speech engine yet: holding the hotkey shows the overlay and inserts a probe string, which is what proves the path from key to text end to end. The recogniser, the model catalogue and the dictionary follow.
home.notYetInfo: Speech recognition runs in a separate, deprivileged worker process — the process that holds the microphone and synthesises keystrokes must never be the one parsing a model file (ADR-PROJ-005).

recording.title: Push-to-talk
recording.info: Hold the combination to record, release it to insert the text into whatever application you were working in. A global shortcut is exclusive: while Huginn holds it, no other application receives it.
recording.combinationHint: Hold to speak, release to insert.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeHint: Huginn follows your desktop unless you tell it otherwise.
appearance.languageHint: The language of the interface. The language Huginn recognises is set with the model.

background.title: Background
background.info: Huginn is a background tool: the hotkey works from any application, but only while Huginn is running. It always keeps a tray icon — that is how you open it again, and how you quit it.
background.autostartHint: Off by default. Nothing adds itself to your startup unasked.
background.autostartFailed: The system refused to change the startup entry.
background.onCloseHint: Closing the window does not stop dictation unless you say so — the hotkey needs Huginn to be running.
